zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Stirling, 1st of Keir於1399年1月1日出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾登布藍時，他的父親Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford12歲，母親Lady Majory Dunbar10歲。他於1445年與Margaret Cunningham在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1471年5月23日在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Stirling, 1st of Keir于1399年1月1日出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾登布藍时，他的父亲Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford12岁，母亲Lady Majory Dunbar10岁。他于1445年与Margaret Cunningham在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1471年5月23日在英国苏格兰培爾培斯享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stirling,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): habitational name from Stirling (Stirlingshire), earlier Scots Strivilin (or similar), a name of uncertain etymology. It is recorded in the 12th century as Strevelin, and is perhaps from a river name. This surname is also common in northern Ireland (Antrim and Derry).

variants.name: Sterling
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Starling, Sterling (Old English Stærling), itself from the bird-name, whose use as a nickname may also be another source of the surname. Compare Stare 2.
German: from Middle High German sterlinc, the name of a coin, hence probably a nickname for someone who paid that amount in rent.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Stirling, 1st of Keir was born on 1 January 1399, in Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, was 12 and his mother, Lady Majory Dunbar, was 10. He married Margaret Cunningham in 1445, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 23 May 1471, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Stirling, 1st of Keir est né le 1 janvier 1399, à Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Lady Majory Dunbar, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Cunningham en 1445, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 mai 1471, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Stirling, 1st of Keir am 1. Januar 1399 in Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford 12 und seine Mutter Lady Majory Dunbar 10. Er hat 1445 in Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Cunningham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. Mai 1471 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Stirling, 1st of Keir è nato il il 1 gennaio 1399 nel Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Lady Majory Dunbar, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Cunningham nel 1445, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 maggio 1471, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Stirling, 1st of Keirが1399年1月1日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアダンブランで生まれた時，父Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawfordは12歳，母Lady Majory Dunbarは10歳であった。1445年にイギリススコットランドでMargaret Cunninghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年5月23日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Stirling, 1st of Keir(이)가 1399년 1월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 던블랜에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Majory Dunbar(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Margaret Cunningham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년 5월 23일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 January 1399–23 May 1471: 1 de janeiro de 1399–23 de maio de 1471
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Stirling, 1st of Keir nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1399, em Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Lady Majory Dunbar, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Cunningham em 1445, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de maio de 1471, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Stirling, 1st of Keir родился 1 января 1399 г. в местности дунблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Majory Dunbar, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Cunningham в 1445 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 мая 1471 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.1 January 1399–23 May 1471: 1 de enero de 1399–23 de mayo de 1471
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Stirling, 1st of Keir nació el 1 de enero de 1399, en Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Lady Majory Dunbar, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Margaret Cunningham en 1445, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1471, en Perth, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
